description_long: This is a male maintenance worker dressed in a green short-sleeved shirt, camouflage-patterned shorts, and brown knee-high boots. He wears a green baseball cap with a yellow accent and carries a brown backpack with a cylindrical tool, possibly a rolled-up mat or pipe, attached to it. In his right hand, he holds a flashlight, and his left hand is relaxed at his side. His facial features are detailed, with a focused expression and short dark hair visible under the cap. The overall appearance suggests he is prepared for outdoor or utility work, possibly in parks or urban infrastructure maintenance.
description: A male maintenance worker in a green shirt, shorts, and boots, carrying a backpack with a cylindrical tool and holding a flashlight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the worker's face, flashlight in hand, and the cylindrical tool strapped to his backpack.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backpack, cylindrical tool, and the back of the cap with yellow accent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the worker's profile, flashlight, and the cylindrical tool on the backpack.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the worker's facial features, green shirt, shorts, and both hands visible.
attribute_uniform_type: green short-sleeved shirt, camouflage shorts, green baseball cap, brown knee-high boots
attribute_tool_carried: cylindrical tool (possibly a rolled mat or pipe)
